descriptions: Brigade 81, affiliated with Hells Angels, attacked Chicanos clubhouse.
edges.evidence_quote: On 5 June 2009, members of the Hells Angels-affiliated Brigade 81 raided the Chicanos' clubhouse in Ludwigsfelde , leaving several club members injured.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Schisa, a splinter of ex-Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo formato dai Minichini e dai De Luca Bossa è tornato in auge, unitamente agli Schisa, costola dell’ex clan Sarno

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with Gerttown Hounds according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters is part of the Islamic State's Philippines Province.
edges.evidence_quote: Philippines Province Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters

descriptions: Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters is listed as a group of Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Philippines Province ... Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters

descriptions: Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters is part of IS Philippines Province.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Philippines Province ... Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters

descriptions: ISPP emerged from BIFF.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: IRA assassinated members of the Cairo Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: On Bloody Sunday, Collins' men set out to assassinate members of a British intelligence group known as the Cairo Gang

descriptions: Mercuri associated with the Corica family.
edges.evidence_quote: associandosi poi alla famiglia Corica

Casalesi clan.description: The Casalesi clan is a powerful clan within the Camorra, operating from San Cipriano d'Aversa in the Province of Caserta, Italy. Formed by Antonio Bardellino in the 1970s, it is a confederation of clans specializing in construction and maintaining a lower profile than drug-dealing groups. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, toxic waste dumping, and violent internal power struggles. It remains active, with members convicted in the Spartacus trial.

descriptions: Members of the Casalesi clan were arrested alongside Farao members in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono stati arrestati pure Antonio e Vincenzo Noviello dei casalesi .

descriptions: Morabito was involved in trafficking with the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: These clans were also involved in trafficking with the Camorra 's Casalesi clan.

descriptions: Morabito trafficked drugs with the Casalesi camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is present throughout the country, and according to the investigations into the clan, it has numerous Swiss bank accounts.

descriptions: Clan dei Casalesi is a Camorra clan involved in an alliance with Chinese gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i clan coinvolti in questa alleanza c'erano il clan dei Casalesi, il clan Fabbrocino e il clan Ascione.

descriptions: The Casalesi were part of an axis with the Mafia and 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione 'Rischiatutto'. Asse Casalesi-Mafia-'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The text states there are excellent relations between Casalesi and Pesce/Bellocco.
edges.evidence_quote: ottimi rapporti intercorrerebbero tra i Casalesi e la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: The Beneduce clan is organically linked to the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Mascolo: assassinato a Baia Domizia il 20 settembre 1988 per non avere ceduto alle richieste estorsive imposte dal clan Beneduce, organico ai casalesi.

descriptions: The Bidognetti clan is a faction within the Casalesi, in conflict with the Schiavone faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Ci sarebbe stato un ulteriore indebolimento ai danni degli Schiavone dovuto ad un contrasto che questi avrebbero avuto con i Bidognetti

descriptions: The Bidognetti family is a group within the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 7 febbraio 2012 vengono sequestrati beni per 4 milioni di euro a carico dei fratelli Roma, imprenditori implicati in affari riguardanti il traffico illegale di rifiuti, coadiuvati con il gruppo del clan facente capo alla famiglia Bidognetti.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Bardellino ... was a powerful Camorrista and boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra

descriptions: The Camorra Casalesi clan is a sub-group of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra Casalesi clan rose in the 1980s, gaining control of large areas of the local economy

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Spartacus Trial ... was a series of criminal trials, each specifically directed against the activities of the powerful Casalesi clan of the Camorra.

descriptions: The satellite clans La Torre and Esposito killed Alberto Beneduce, a Casalesi member, indicating conflict.
time_periods: fine degli anni ottanta e inizio degli anni novanta
edges.evidence_quote: l'omicidio di Alberto Beneduce, operato dai clan satelliti La Torre ed Esposito

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Alfieri clan (defunct)

descriptions: Casalesi and Alfieri were allied in a coalition against Nuvoletta and Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: The Bardellino clan was supported by the Alfieri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino appoggiato dai suoi alleati Carmine Alfieri e Pasquale Galasso

descriptions: The Galasso clan is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Galasso clan (defunct)

descriptions: The Bardellino clan was supported by the Galasso clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan è inoltre attivo anche nel traffico di eroina e cocaina , con diversi boss di cosa nostra statunitense della famiglia Gambino di New York , John Gotti e con la famiglia Genovese

edges.evidence_quote: Heroin was smuggled as well, and shipments to the Gambino crime family were concealed inside espresso filters.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan smuggled heroin to the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Heroin was smuggled as well, and shipments to the Gambino crime family were concealed inside espresso filters.

descriptions: The Casalesi cooperate with the Gambino family in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan è inoltre attivo anche nel traffico di eroina e cocaina , con diversi boss di cosa nostra statunitense della famiglia Gambino di New York , John Gotti

descriptions: The Iovine faction is a faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Mentre per la fazione Iovine, secondo la DDA risulta essere quasi totalmente assente dopo il pentimento del boss Antonio Iovine

descriptions: The Mallardo clan is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mallardo clan

edges.evidence_quote: Prima dell'altro arresto scaturito da un'inchiesta sul clan Moccia, al quale Ferrucci era anche legato

descriptions: The Casalesi clan fought against Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Casalesi fought a war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, killing four of its members.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto un ruolo chiave nella guerra dei Casalesi contro la Nuova Camorra Organizzata, partecipando ai famigerati omicidi Pagano-Mennillo-Orsi-Gagliardi

descriptions: The Casalesi clan families allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi clan familiari negli anni '70 si erano legati alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata fondata nel 1970 da Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Casalesi clan allied with Nuova Famiglia during the Camorra war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: Clan dei Casalesi was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

descriptions: The Casalesi were recognized as belonging to the Nuova Famiglia alliance.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a founding component of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ad Antonio Bardellino e gli altri clan di camorra dell'agro aversano, costituì la cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Casalesi clan (Bardellino) and the Nuvoletta clan went to war in late 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the NF alliance soon disintegrated, with a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.

descriptions: Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans fought a war.
edges.evidence_quote: a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983

edges.evidence_quote: faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: Antonio Bardellini, founder of the Casalesi, became the armed wing of the Nuvoletta clan in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Entrato in contatto con il clan Nuvoletta di Marano di Napoli, di cui costituì nel 1977 il braccio armato

edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino had close and powerful contacts within the Sicilian Mafia, initially with the Porta Nuova family of Pippo Calò.

descriptions: The Schiavone clan is a historical faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Per quanto riguarda le varie fazioni storiche che da sempre hanno composto l'organizzazione, gli Schiavone risulterebbero i più indeboliti.

descriptions: The Schiavone group is an affiliated group of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 vengono sequestrati beni tra Caserta e Modena per un valore complessivo di cinquanta milioni di euro agli Schiavone, gruppo affiliato dei Casalesi guidato da Francesco Schiavone.

descriptions: Vittorio Simeone of the Casalesi was suspected of having contacts with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Vittorio Simeone nel 1966 fu sospettato di avere contatti con cosa nostra

descriptions: The Casalesi allied with Cosa Nostra to monopolize the transport sector in southern Italy.
edges.evidence_quote: L'operazione si basa su indagini riguardanti un'alleanza tra la camorra e la mafia per acquisire nel Mezzogiorno il monopolio nel settore dei trasporti

descriptions: Bardellino, boss of Casalesi, was initiated into Cosa Nostra, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: He was one of the few Camorra bosses who were also initiated into Cosa Nostra.

descriptions: The Zagaria faction is a faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Per quanto riguarda la fazione di Michele Zagaria , essa sarebbe quasi totalmente rivolta agli investimenti nell'economia legale

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is listed as an ally of the Catania family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: , Pietraperzia Mafia family , Caltagirone Mafia family , Ramacca Mafia family , Riesi Mafia family , Santa Maria di Gesù Mafia family , Passo di Rigano Mafia family , Casalesi clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: The Santapaola clan (Catania Mafia family) allied with the Casalesi clan in a price-fixing cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010, Italian authorities uncovered a criminal alliance between the Casalesi clan of the Camorra and the Santapaolas, forming what investigators describe as a price-fixing cartel in the fruit and vegetable transport sector across Central and Southern Italy.

descriptions: Alfieri and Casalesi were on opposite sides in the internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: I Casalesi di Bardellino erano invece sostenuti dai cosiddetti scappati come Tommaso Buscetta...

edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002, il clan dei Casalesi ha ucciso Raffaele Lubrano, figlio di Vincenzo

descriptions: Madonia and Casalesi cooperated in cocaine distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia siciliana Madonia di Palermo la distribuisce nell'Europa centrale, mentre il clan dei Corleonesi nell'Europa dell'est. I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had very close contacts with the Casalesi clan, and Mario Magliulo was a co-founder with Antonio Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Magliulo avevano avuto contatti molto stretti con il clan dei Casalesi; uno dei fondatori insieme ad Antonio Bardellino, boss storico dei Casalesi, fu Mario Magliulo, cognato di Bardellino.

descriptions: The Gambino family is allied with the Camorra Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Camorra Casalesi clan, ...

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Camorra Casalesi clan, Chicago Outfit, Cleveland crime family, Colombo crime family, Cosa Nostra Inzerillo Mafia clan, Corleonesi, DeCavalcante crime family, Detroit Partnership, Genovese crime family, Inzerillo Mafia clan, Los Angeles crime family, Lucchese crime family, New Orleans crime family, Patriarca crime family, Philadelphia crime family, Trafficante crime family, Aryan Brotherhood, Bloods, Crips, Group America, Hells Angels MC, Latin Kings, Mexican Mafia, Pagan's MC, Westies

descriptions: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the formation of the Nuova Famiglia, consisting particularly of the Giuliano clan, the Zaza clan, then headed by Michele Zaza, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan

edges.evidence_quote: Da segnalare è anche un accordo con Giuseppe Caterino, detto Peppinotto, appartenente al Clan dei Casalesi

descriptions: Casalesi clan is an ally of the Mallardo clan.

descriptions: Mallardo and Casalesi clans allied to control wholesale markets.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mallardo and Casalesi clans in an alliance with the Catania Mafia family of the Cosa Nostra, had established violent control over key wholesale markets in Fondi and Giugliano.

descriptions: Mallardo clan and Casalesi were allied with Catania mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: la Direzione Investigativa Antimafia di Catania ha smantellato un'alleanza tra il clan Mallardo , il clan dei Casalesi e membri della potente famiglia mafiosa catanese

descriptions: The NCO clashed with entrepreneurial cartels including Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli scontri tra NCO e cartelli “imprenditoriali” (Zaza, Nuvoletta, Bardellino e alleati) si alimentarono della rendita del contrabbando.

descriptions: Most groups of the Nuova Camorra Speciale ended up gravitating around the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: la maggior parte di tali gruppi finì col gravitare attorno al clan dei Casalesi

descriptions: Bardellino was part of the Nuova Famiglia axis.
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri — concepita per contrastare l’espansione della NCO sul territorio campano.

descriptions: Casalesi clan joined the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Successivamente la FN si alleò alle cosche e ai boss vicini alla mafia siciliana, tra cui la famiglia Nuvoletta, Michele Zaza, gli Alfieri, i Galasso e infine il clan dei Casalesi.

descriptions: Bardellino's Casalesi clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino was the main exponent of the Nuova Famiglia (NF)

descriptions: Bardellino clan was part of NF alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the NF alliance soon disintegrated into many feuding clans, with a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Antonio Bardellino, boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan maintained a centralized structure, similar to the NMC's goal.
edges.evidence_quote: Tuttavia, alcuni clan, come i Casalesi, riuscirono a mantenere una struttura più centralizzata.

descriptions: After defeating NCO, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan (led by Bardellino) fought each other.
edges.evidence_quote: war broke out among the anti-NCO coalition, in particular between the Nuvoletta clan from Marano and Antonio Bardellino at the end of 1983

descriptions: Antonio Bardellino led an attack on the Nuvoletta clan, killing Ciro Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: a commando of approximately fifteen armed men led by Antonio Bardellino attacked the Nuvoletta stronghold

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Casalesi clan

edges.evidence_quote: emergono le rivalità tra i Nuvoletta e Bardellino

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan (Corleonesi allies) opposed the Bardellino clan (allied with Bontate etc.).
edges.evidence_quote: e quello di Casal di Principe guidato da Antonio Bardellino, rimasto alleato ai Bontate-Buscetta-Inzerillo-Riccobono

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between the Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans, won by Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra strengthened operational ties with Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: Il soggiorno obbligato di esponenti di Cosa nostra in Campania consolidò legami operativi con camorristi napoletani e casertani, tra cui Zaza, Nuvoletta e Bardellino.

descriptions: Società foggiana and Casalesi cooperated in counterfeiting and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Le indagini hanno dimostrato come esistano rapporti tra Società foggiana e casalesi

descriptions: Chinese gangs allied with Casalesi clan in industrial waste export scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, investigators uncovered a plan between the Camorra and Chinese gangs: these exported industrial waste from Italy to China which guaranteed revenues of millions of euros for both organizations. Industrial waste left Prato and arrived in Hong Kong. Among the clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan, the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.

descriptions: Zaza and Bardellino (Casalesi) cooperated in cocaine distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

Black Diamond Riders Motorcycle Club.description: Canadian outlaw biker gang based in Toronto, founded in 1951 (or 1953) by Harry Paul Barnes. Known as the most violent biker gang in Toronto in the 1950s and early 1960s, they engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, assault, and kidnapping. Their dominance ended after conflicts with Satan's Choice Motorcycle Club in the mid-1960s, but the club remains active.

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders was founded by a former member of Humber Valley Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: Harry Paul Barnes, aka "Johnny Sombrero", of Toronto was a member of the Humber Valley Riders Motorcycle Club, but broke away in 1951 to found the Black Diamond Riders.

descriptions: Lost Souls was founded by expelled members of Black Diamond Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The expelled Black Diamond Riders founded what journalist Jerry Langton called the "rather forlornly named" Lost Souls Motorcycle Club of Milton.

descriptions: Satan's Choice is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Satan's Choice Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Satan's Choice was founded to counter Black Diamond Riders and fought them in a biker war.
edges.evidence_quote: To end the attacks of the Black Diamond Riders, four other biker gangs merged under the leadership of Bernie Guindon to found Satan's Choice Motorcycle Club in 1965. Satan's Choice greatly outnumbered the Black Diamond Riders, and in turn used their numerical superiority to beat the Black Diamond Riders in a series of brawls across the Toronto area in 1965–1966.

descriptions: Satan's Choice attacked Black Diamond Riders in the 'Sudbury Saturday Night' brawl.
edges.evidence_quote: On a Saturday night during the Labour Day weekend in 1992, a brawl broke in the parking lot of the Sorrento Motor Hotel in Sudbury, where Barnes and 6 other Black Diamond Riders were beaten up by Guindon along with 44 other Satan's Choice bikers armed with guns, knives, boards and baseball bats.

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders defeated Golden Hawk Riders in the Battle of Pebblestone in 1962.
edges.evidence_quote: Guindon had sought vengeance on the Black Diamond Riders ever since the 1962 brawl known as the 'Battle of Pebblestone', where they defeated the Golden Hawk Riders (with Guindon a member at the time).

descriptions: Phantom Riders revived Satan's Choice to enrage Black Diamond Riders, indicating hostility.
edges.evidence_quote: Phantom Riders president Bernie Guindon subsequently revived the name and patch of the disbanded club as a way to enrage the Black Diamond Riders.

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders attacked and forced the original Satan's Choice to disband in 1962.
edges.evidence_quote: Harry Paul Barnes of the Black Diamond Riders started a biker war against Satan's Choice.

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Diamond Riders MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice Toronto chapter started a gang war with Black Diamond Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: This success emboldened elements of Satan's Choice, in particular their Toronto chapter, into sparking a gang war with two rival biker gangs in the city, the Black Diamond Riders MC and the Vagabonds MC.

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Black Diamond Riders were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Diamond Riders MC

descriptions: Black Diamond Riders are listed as rivals of Satan's Choice in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice fought a brawl with the Black Diamond Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: On 5 September 1992 in Sudbury, the Satan's Choice bikers were involved in a brawl with the Black Diamond Riders in a motel parking lot that put eight of the Riders into the hospital.

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Diamond Riders as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Diamond Riders as a rival of Satan's Choice.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: The Mazzullo were part of the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: Hanshin-kai is a clan within Yamaguchi-gumi.

'Ndrina Libri.description: The Libri 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1950s by brothers Domenico and Pasquale Libri. It reached its peak in the 1960s-1970s and is considered one of the most aggressive and entrenched clans in the city. Its activities include drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and infiltration into public institutions. The clan suffered losses during the Second 'Ndrangheta war and its founder died in prison in 2006.

descriptions: Barreca allied with Libri during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

Gangster Disciples.description: The Gangster Disciples are an African-American street and prison gang founded in Chicago in 1968 by David Barksdale and Larry Hoover. Originally formed as the Black Gangster Disciple Nation, the group split in 1989 into the Gangster Disciple Nation and the Black Disciple Nation. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, assault, firearms violations, fraud, homicide, and money laundering, with an estimated 30,000 members in Chicago and operations across the United States and internationally.

descriptions: IRGC commander claimed they directed Houthi attacks on Saudi oil tankers.

descriptions: IRGC commanders actively directed Houthi attacks in 2024.

La Mano con Ojos.description: La Mano con Ojos was a Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking and methamphetamine production, formed as a remnant of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and Los Valencia. It was led by Eznel Cortés Jiménez and Óscar Osvaldo García Montoya, operating primarily in Mexico City and the State of Mexico. The group was dismantled after the arrest of its leaders, with García Montoya sentenced to 116 years in prison.

descriptions: La Mano Con Ojos is a faction from Beltrán-Leyva Cartel breakup.
edges.evidence_quote: the organization broke apart into smaller factions: the South Pacific Cartel, La Mano Con Ojos

descriptions: La Mano Con Ojos is a splinter group of Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: Fragmentación ... - La Mano Con Ojos y Cártel del Centro en Estado de México y Ciudad de México .

descriptions: Both Cártel de Tláhuac and La Mano con Ojos originated from splinters of Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: originándose también de esta manera La Mano con Ojos

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos initiated a dispute with La Mano con Ojos.
edges.evidence_quote: Finalmente en 2011, El Tilde funda Guerreros Unidos e inicia una disputa con otros cárteles emergentes del extinto Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva conocidos como el Cartel del Pacífico Sur, La Mano con Ojos y Los Rojos, organizaciones que desaparecieron posteriormente.

descriptions: La Mano con Ojos is a remnant of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Mano con Ojos fue una organización criminal mexicana dedicada al tráfico ilegal de drogas y a la producción de metanfetamina, siendo remanentes del Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva y Los Valencia.

6.57 Crew.description: The 6.57 Crew is an English football hooligan firm and vigilante group linked to Portsmouth F.C., named after the departure time of a train from Portsmouth to London. Active since the 1980s, the group has been involved in numerous violent clashes, including a 2004 riot against Southampton fans that led to 93 arrests. Membership has declined from 200-500 in the 1980s to 50-150 in the 2000s, but the group remains active as of 2023.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Spanish's gang engaged in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A violent war between the two soon began; fighting, particularly in the garment district, continued until Johnny Spanish was killed while leaving a Manhattan restaurant by three men, most likely including Kaplan, on July 29, 1919.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Spanish's gang were initially allied, then became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The two gangs were allied for a while before a bitter personal rivalry developed between the Dropper and Johnny Spanish.

descriptions: The Banda della Comasina was often in conflict with the Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: it was often at odds with the band of Francis Turatello

descriptions: NCO had an alliance with Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turatello Crew

descriptions: Turatello Crew is listed as an ally of NCO in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese , Banda della Magliana , Turatello Crew , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: NCO was allied with Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turatello Crew

descriptions: Initially in a gang war, the two groups later formed an alliance after their leaders reconciled in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: The Turatello Crew and Banda della Comasina had been in the middle of a gang war with each other when their leaders, Vallanzasca and Turatello, were incarcerated in the same prison, reconciling and bonding there. The newly forged alliance between the two crime groups only increased their influence and power in the Milan underworld.

descriptions: The Turatello Crew was allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (Camorra).
edges.evidence_quote: As the leader of the so-called Turatello Crew, Francis Turatello was a protégé of the Sicilian Mafia and an important ally in Milan, for both the Sicilian Mafia and Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: The Turatello Crew was allied with the Sicilian Mafia (Cosa Nostra).
edges.evidence_quote: As the leader of the so-called Turatello Crew, Francis Turatello was a protégé of the Sicilian Mafia and an important ally in Milan, for both the Sicilian Mafia and Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
